title: fix can't run by source code
body:
the error is:    fix NoMatches: No nodes match <class 'textual.widgets._rich_log.RichLog'> on XHSDownloader

Explore the source code to identify the files and functions to modify.

step_plan.summary: Fixes a runtime NoMatches error by changing the widget lookup in XHSDownloader.on_mount from self.screen.query_one(RichLog) to self.query_one(RichLog), ensuring the RichLog composed on the Index screen is found when the app starts.

steps.operation: Replace usage of screen.query_one with app-wide query for RichLog
steps.reason: The call self.screen.query_one(RichLog) raises NoMatches because the RichLog instance is composed on the pushed Index screen and is not found on the object being queried. Using the app-wide query self.query_one(RichLog) correctly searches the active widget tree and will locate the RichLog widget after the Index screen is pushed, matching the usage elsewhere and preventing the runtime NoMatches error.
steps.side_effects: Behavior: Fixes the NoMatches runtime error and allows Settings.check_keys to log to the RichLog. If multiple RichLog widgets exist, self.query_one will return the first match — this mirrors other code paths but could change which RichLog receives logs in rare multi-log layouts. Tests: update or add an integration test that instantiates XHSDownloader (or runs main.py) to ensure no exception is raised and settings logging is visible. Dependents: No external API changes; callers of XHSDownloader.on_mount are unaffected. Other TUI screens/components should continue to work, but verify logging behavior if the app later composes additional RichLog widgets.
